data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the device running FlappyBoard
data_description.token: Bearer token shown in the FlappyBoard Settings screen (long-press the board)
data_description.fingerprint: SHA-256 fingerprint from the FlappyBoard Settings screen. Strongly recommended — enables certificate pinning so the connection cannot be intercepted. Leave blank to skip (not recommended).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check the host, port, and token.
error.fingerprint_mismatch: The certificate fingerprint does not match. Copy the fingerprint exactly from the FlappyBoard Settings screen.
error.invalid_fingerprint: Fingerprint must be a hex string (with or without colons).
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs for details.
